capabilities.name: Loyalty/points
capabilities.verify: loyalty_accounts + loyalty_transactions tables, manage_loyalty RPC/skill (enroll/get/list/earn/redeem/adjust, bronze/silver/gold tiers), auto-earn trigger on completed pos_sales (1 pt / 10 units) (migration 20260707214000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: enroll → sale R-20260707-99397 auto-earned 62 pts via trigger → partial refund clawed back 31 pts (balance 31).

capabilities.name: Tipping
capabilities.verify: pos_sales.tip_cents + add_tip RPC/skill (records tip + tip payment row) (migration 20260613050000)
capabilities.notes: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: add_tip RPC verified LIVE on dev (rzhj): sale R-20260707-87201 tip 500 -> grand_total 5500. Admin UI: post-checkout 'Add a tip?' dialog (5/10/15%/custom) in POSPage Register tab via useAddTip hook; History shows '+ tip' and grand total (commit eb8b51d6).

capabilities.name: Branded receipt templates
capabilities.verify: pos_registers.receipt_header/receipt_footer + render_pos_receipt RPC/skill returning receipt (lines/payments/totals/tip/refund/invoice) + template block (register header/footer + site branding from site_settings) (migration 20260707214000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: full receipt payload incl. site branding rendered for R-20260707-99397.

capabilities.name: Receipt→invoice linking
capabilities.verify: pos_sales.invoice_id column + pos_sale_to_invoice RPC/skill (draft invoice POS-YYYYMMDD-##### from sale lines, idempotent re-link) (migration 20260707214000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: sale ea72bb6c → invoice POS-20260707-39122, linked back on the sale.

capabilities.name: Refund/return workflow
capabilities.verify: refund_pos_sale RPC/skill: negative sale linked via refund_of (RF- receipt), per-line partial refunds with over-refund guard, restock stock.movement, loyalty clawback, original → refunded/partially_refunded (migration 20260707214000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: partial refund of 1/2 units (-31250) restocked the product (16→17) and set original to partially_refunded. In-round fix: pos_payments CHECK (amount_cents > 0) blocked negative refund payments → relaxed to <> 0.

capabilities.name: Gift-card balance
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: manage_gift_card issue live over gateway (GC-TEST-001, 500 kr → gift_card_id, balance_cents 50000). UI: Gift Cards tab in POSPage + useGiftCards hook (issue/get/list/deactivate).
capabilities.notes: Admin UI built + Stage-3 live 2026-07-06. redeem at checkout via redeem_gift_card (separate).

capabilities.name: Table/seat management (F&B)
capabilities.verify: pos_tables table + manage_pos_table RPC/skill (create/update/list/delete/seat/release), pos_sales.table_id link (migration 20260707214000)
capabilities.notes: Verified LIVE on dev 2026-07-07: Table 1 created, seated with sale (list shows current receipt), released.
